properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14 v15

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God's attributes were manifested To His Bride in this last age. We have caught the revelation By the last prophet's message. And we know who we are And what we are raised up for, Praise the Lord, for the Original Life.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Original Life, the Original Seed The Original Word is what I believe. The Son of Man is revealed The seventh seal is unveiled The Original Life, the Original Seed.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are the Word made flesh today This is what the Scriptures say. And our names are seen within, Redeemed and perfect without sin. Yes, we are anointed and inspired By our God, Who's the Original Life.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Original Life, the Original Seed The Original Word is what I believe. The Son of Man is revealed The seventh seal is unveiled The Original Life, the Original Seed.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our eyes of understanding He has opened up at last. And sweet victory is ours Who were chained down in the past. True Jubilee has sounded And we have responded To our God, Who's the Original Life.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We are called unto adoption Full authority and power. Sleeping saints will wake and join us For translation in this hour. Gentiles' days will soon be over Glory, hallelujah! To our God, Who's the Original Life.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: The Original Life, the Original Seed The Original Word is what I believe. The Son of Man is revealed The seventh seal is unveiled The Original Life, the Original Seed.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: From glory unto glory I'm being changed Soon we'll lay aside this flesh To enter eternal rest I'm being changed I'm being changed I'm being changed Putting on my theophany

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: From glory unto glory I'm being changed Soon we'll lay aside this flesh To enter eternal rest I'm being changed I'm being changed I'm being changed Putting on my theophany

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Make sure everything is intact For soon He'll be coming back I'm being changed putting on my theophany Get your tickets in your hand To join that big great heavenly clan I'm being changed putting on my theophany We'll sing in one accord As he says welcome all aboard I'm being changed putting on my theophany Don't be late, don't hesitate For He'll be waiting at the eastern gate I'm being changed putting on my theophany

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: (Acapella) From glory unto glory I'm being changed Soon we'll lay aside this flesh To enter eternal rest I'm being changed I'm being changed I'm being changed Putting on my theophany

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: From glory unto glory I'm being changed Soon we'll lay aside this flesh To enter eternal rest I'm being changed I'm being changed I'm being changed Putting on my theophany

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: The Original Life, the Original Seed The Original Word is what I believe. The Son of Man is revealed The seventh seal is unveiled The Original Life, the Original Seed.

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: The Son of Man is revealed The seventh seal is unveiled The Original Life, the Original Seed. (2x)
